name: Stuffed Bell Peppers
tagline: Bell peppers stuffed with rice, herbs, tomato — Mediterranean style

hero.alt: Stuffed bell peppers with herbed rice in tomato sauce
hero.caption: stuffed peppers — herbed rice

steps.title: Hollow the peppers
steps.detail: Slice tops off bell peppers; hollow seeds and ribs. Reserve the tops as lids.
steps.tip: Stand the peppers in the dish first to check stability — slice a thin sliver off the bottom if wobbly.

steps.title: Build the filling
steps.detail: Sweat onion in olive oil 5 min, add garlic 1 min. Stir in diced tomatoes, simmer 5 min. Off heat, fold in cooked rice, dill, mint, lemon juice.
steps.tip: Slightly under-cook the rice — it'll finish in the oven and absorb pepper juices.

steps.title: Stuff and arrange
steps.detail: Pack filling into peppers, replace lids. Stand in a baking dish. Pour tomato sauce around the bottom; drizzle olive oil over the tops.
steps.tip: A piece of foil over the dish for the first 30 minutes prevents tops from over-browning.

steps.title: Bake until tender
steps.detail: Bake covered at 375°F for 35 min, then uncovered 10 min, until peppers slump and look slightly charred on the tops.
steps.tip: Spoon some pan tomato sauce over each pepper before serving.

healthFacts: Bell peppers have more vitamin C than oranges per gram, especially red.
Pine-nut-free rice filling makes this nut-free too.
